title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Respiratory and Allergy Therapies (SAC-RAT) - Agenda - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Respiratory and Allergy Therapies (SAC-RAT) - Agenda
Date and Time: Friday November 2, 2018 / 9 am to 4 pm Chairperson: Irvin Mayers Science Advisor: Conrad Pereira Scientific Regulatory Affairs Supervisor: Carl Poulin Participants: SAC-RAT Members, Health Canada employees
9:00am-9:05am Opening remarks Director General, J. Patrick Stewart, Therapeutic Products Directorate
9:05am-9:20am Introductions, Affiliations and Interests declarations, Review of Agenda, Introduction of new member Chair and members
9:20am-11:00am Presentations: - Comparative Pulmonary PK and in vivo bioequivalence of OIPs - Quality considerations in the assessment of generic DPIs and pMDIs Bureau of Pharmaceutical Sciences
11:00am-12:00pm Discussion SAC-RAT members
12:00pm-1:00pm Lunch
1:00pm-3:45pm Discussion and Recommendation SAC-RAT members
3:45pm- 4:00pm Next steps, Closing Remarks and Adjournment of Meeting Chair
